section_name: Administrative Penalty for Failure to Provide Certificate or for False Information on Certificate
chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) The department may investigate and impose an administrative penalty on a shipper who:

(1) does not provide a shipper’s certificate of weight required under Section 623.274 (Shipper’s Certificate of Weight) (b); or

(2) provides false information on a shipper’s certificate of weight that the shipper delivers to a person transporting a shipment.

(b) The notice and hearing requirements of Section 643.2525 (Administrative Hearing Process) apply to the imposition of an administrative penalty under this section as if the action were being taken under that section.

(c) The amount of an administrative penalty imposed under this section is calculated in the same manner as the amount of an administrative penalty imposed under Section 643.251 (Administrative Penalty) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.272 — Administrative Penalty for Failure to Provide Certificate or for False Information on Certificate

(a) The department may investigate and impose an administrative penalty on a shipper who:

    (1) does not provide a shipper’s certificate of weight required under Section 623.274 (Shipper’s Certificate of Weight) (b); or

    (2) provides false information on a shipper’s certificate of weight that the shipper delivers to a person transporting a shipment.

(b) The notice and hearing requirements of Section 643.2525 (Administrative Hearing Process) apply to the imposition of an administrative penalty under this section as if the action were being taken under that section.

(c) The amount of an administrative penalty imposed under this section is calculated in the same manner as the amount of an administrative penalty imposed under Section 643.251 (Administrative Penalty) .

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1129 (H.B.2620), Sec. 10, eff. September 1, 2019.*

does not provide a shipper’s certificate of weight required under Section 623.274 (Shipper’s Certificate of Weight) (b); or
provides false information on a shipper’s certificate of weight that the shipper delivers to a person transporting a shipment.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: The amount of an administrative penalty imposed under this section is calculated in the same manner as the amount of an administrative penalty imposed under Section 643.251 (Administrative Penalty) .
